Bartolomé Esteban Murillo

5 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Ecce Agnus Dei
by Bartolomé Esteban Murillo
Spain · 17th Century · 1650–1660 · Oil on canvas
Madonna Nursing the Christ Child
by Bartolomé Esteban Murillo
Spain · c. 1670–72 · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash over red and black chalk, with traces of white; framing lines in pen and brown ink
Laban Searching for His Stolen Household Gods
by Bartolomé Esteban Murillo
Spain · c. 1665–70 · oil on canvas
Saint Joseph and the Sleeping Christ Child
by Bartolomé Esteban Murillo
Spain · 1670–1675 · Pen and brown ink
The Immaculate Conception
by Bartolomé Esteban Murillo
Spain · c. 1680 · oil on canvas
